compiled_state.title: RED: Eval test case for resolution loop behavior in implementation-plan
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add a promptfoo eval test case to plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml asserting resolution loop behavior.

**Test case**: Given a story context with proposals and a decision-maker counter-proposal scenario, assert the skill describes:
- Dispatching the decision-maker agent
- Handling accept/revise/escalate responses
- Persisting cycle count
- Escalating to user after 2 cycles

**TDD**: RED against current SKILL.md (no resolution loop). Evals run via run-skill-evals.sh, separate from run-all.sh — no .test-index RED marker needed. RED state tracked by eval runner only.

## Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0) — evals not included
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Eval config has resolution loop test case
  Verify: grep -q 'description:.*resolution' plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] Test case has llm-rubric assertion
  Verify: grep -A15 "resolution" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml | grep -q "llm-rubric"

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — existing eval has 8 test cases; SKILL.md mentions decision-maker agent dispatch for sprint context but has no resolution loop (accept/revise/escalate, cycle count, user escalation after 2 cycles); approach-decision-output.md contract defines selection and counter_proposal modes; RED test will assert behaviors not yet implemented in SKILL.md
comments.author: Main
